CloudMatrix.title: Cloud Matrix Root Element
CloudMatrix.description: Root element for a Cloud Matrix assessment payload.

title.description: Display title of the Cloud Matrix assessment payload.

description.description: Optional narrative summary of the Cloud Matrix assessment.

version.description: Version identifier of the current Cloud Matrix assessment schema.

breakouts.description: Collection of breakout sections included in the assessment.

actionPlan.notesAndObjectives: Consolidate collaboration tools and reduce third-party overlap.

displacements.name: Legacy PBX
displacements.notes: Expected 33% reduction in total voice platform cost.

CloudMatrixCorrelation.title: Cloud Matrix Correlation
CloudMatrixCorrelation.description: Represents a Cloud Matrix correlation record, including customer and publisher details, as well as key timestamps and identifiers.

accountName.description: The name of the customer account associated with this cloud matrix correlation record.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the report was created.

discoverDate.description: Timestamp of when the discovery process was initiated.

isComplete.description: Indicates whether the discovery process has been completed for this cloud matrix correlation record.

template.description: The name of the template associated with this cloud matrix correlation record.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the report was last updated.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version number of the correlation payload.

ValueAssessment.title: Value Assessment
ValueAssessment.description: Aggregates action planning, profile data, assessment elements, and displacement opportunities.

displacements.name: Legacy PBX
displacements.notes: Expected 33% reduction in total voice platform cost.

ActionPlan.title: Action Plan
ActionPlan.description: High-level discovery and ownership metadata for the account.

accountName.description: Customer account name associated with the action plan.

discoveryDate.description: Date and time when discovery was performed.

accountManager.description: Name of the account manager assigned to the engagement.

consultant.description: Name of the consultant supporting the assessment.

licensingExecutive.description: Name of the licensing executive for the account.

customerSuccessManager.description: Name of the customer success manager supporting adoption.

notesAndObjectives.description: Summary of engagement notes, goals, and business objectives.

crmId.description: CRM identifier associated with the customer record.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the action plan was created.

modifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the action plan was last modified.

primaryPublisher.description: Primary software publisher identified in the assessment.

UserProfileValue.title: User Profile Value
UserProfileValue.description: Single named value inside a user profile detail group.

name.description: Label of the user profile value field.

value.description: Value associated with the profile field name.

UserProfileDetailGroup.title: User Profile Detail Group
UserProfileDetailGroup.description: Groups related user-profile values under a section name.

name.description: Section name grouping related profile values.

values.description: List of named values within the profile detail group.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Named user profile and grouped details used by assessment elements.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user profile.

name.description: Display name of the user profile.

details.description: Grouped detail sections describing the user profile.

AssessmentElement.title: Assessment Element
AssessmentElement.description: One roadmap element with metadata, profile values, and product licensing features.

AssessmentMetadata.title: Assessment Metadata
AssessmentMetadata.description: Descriptive data and year-based configuration for a roadmap element.

name.description: Name of the roadmap element being assessed.

breakoutId.description: Identifier of the breakout associated with this element.

category.description: Primary category for the roadmap element.

subCategory.description: Secondary category within the primary category.

help.description: Guidance text explaining the purpose of the element.

licensingProduct.description: Licensing product mapped to this element.

licensingProductHelp.description: Additional licensing guidance for the mapped product.

isAddon.description: Indicates whether the element is treated as an add-on.

isStrategicAddon.description: Indicates whether the add-on is classified as strategic.

isTenantBased.description: Indicates whether the element is tenant-level rather than profile-level.

notes.description: Optional notes relevant to planning or rollout context.

sourceValue.description: Source baseline value used for this assessment element.

YearConfig.title: Year Configuration
YearConfig.description: Year-specific value and mapping configuration for an assessment element.

value.description: Planned value for the given year configuration.

userProfileIds.description: User profile IDs included in this year configuration.

isDeepDive.description: Indicates whether this configuration requires deep-dive analysis.

altProduct.description: Alternative product considered for this configuration.

publisher.description: Publisher associated with the selected or alternative product.

useCase.description: Business use case targeted by this configuration.

ProfileValue.title: Profile Value
ProfileValue.description: Profile-level numeric score/value on an assessment element.

name.description: Name of the user profile associated with the score.

abbreviation.description: Short code used to represent the user profile.

value.description: Numeric score or value assigned to the user profile.

FeatureEntry.title: Feature Entry
FeatureEntry.description: Licensing bucket and mapped product entries for an assessment element.

licensing.description: Licensing bundle associated with this feature entry.

products.description: Product mappings included in this licensing bucket.

SubscriptionFeature.title: Subscription Feature
SubscriptionFeature.description: Licensing group used inside breakout subscription mappings.

licensing.description: Licensing label for the subscription feature grouping.

products.description: Product mappings associated with the subscription license.

ProductEntry.title: Product Entry
ProductEntry.description: Product mapping with value and optional comment.

product.description: The product name for this licensing entry.

value.description: The assigned licensing value for the product.

comment.description: Additional notes or clarification about the product value.

SubscriptionProductEntry.title: Subscription Product Entry
SubscriptionProductEntry.description: Product entry used for breakout subscription features.

product.description: The product name for this licensing entry.

value.description: The assigned licensing value for the product.

comment.description: Additional notes or clarification about the product value.

DisplacementEntry.title: Displacement Entry
DisplacementEntry.description: Current provider and replacement proposal for a displacement opportunity.

name.description: The name of the displacement opportunity or current solution being evaluated.

notes.description: Additional context, assumptions, or business rationale for the displacement entry.
examples: Expected 33% reduction in total voice platform cost.

examples.name: Legacy PBX
examples.notes: Expected 33% reduction in total voice platform cost.

ProviderInfo.title: Provider Info
ProviderInfo.description: Current provider contract and cost details.

name.description: Name of the current provider or solution.

terms.description: Contract terms for the provider agreement.

contractNumber.description: Contract number associated with the provider agreement.

expiryDate.description: Contract expiration date for the current provider.

DisplacementInfo.title: Displacement Info
DisplacementInfo.description: Replacement solution details and projected cost scenarios.

terms.description: Contract terms proposed for the replacement solution.

contractNumber.description: Contract number for the replacement agreement.

expiryDate.description: Contract expiration date for the replacement solution.

replacementDate.description: Date when the replacement solution is expected to take effect.

costs.description: Projected cost entries for the replacement solution.

ProviderCosts.title: Provider Costs
ProviderCosts.description: Aggregated cost fields for a provider contract.

contractValue.description: Total contract value over the full term.

MonetaryCostEntry.title: Monetary Cost Entry
MonetaryCostEntry.description: One cost scenario containing monthly, annual, and total contract values.

monthlyCost.description: Monthly cost amount for this scenario.

annualCost.description: Annualized cost amount for this scenario.

contractValue.description: Total contract value for this scenario.

Breakout.title: Breakout
Breakout.description: A breakout section that groups related domain features.

title.description: The display title of the breakout section.

breakoutId.description: A unique identifier for the breakout section.

breakoutName.description: The normalized name of the breakout domain.

features.description: Feature rows included in this breakout section.

BreakoutFeature.title: Breakout Feature
BreakoutFeature.description: Feature row inside a breakout section with subscription mappings.

roadmapElementPath.description: Hierarchical path of the roadmap element represented by this feature.

elementSubdimension.description: Subdimension used to classify the roadmap element.

roadmapProduct.description: Product family or platform associated with the roadmap element.

feature.description: Specific feature name within the roadmap product.

description.description: Functional summary of the feature and its primary capability.

publisherLink.description: URL to the publisher or official reference page for this feature.

subscriptionFeatures.description: Subscription-based licensing mappings for this feature.
